caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a white Nehru jacket over a white shirt, stands behind a dark brown wooden podium delivering a speech. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green stone wall with a geometric pattern, flanked by tall, gold-colored cylindrical pillars adorned with small red flowers. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man uses hand gestures to emphasize his points; he begins by looking forward, then raises his right hand with a curled finger, and eventually extends his right index finger upward in a pointing gesture. His expression remains focused as he speaks, and his posture remains centered behind the podium throughout the scene. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
